domain.name: communication
domain.description: Short written communication and conversational planning (greetings, replies, tone selection).

task.name: simple_greeting_response
task.title: Simple Greeting and Reply Options
task.description: Provide a brief greeting record and several short reply options with tones and usage notes.

schema.name: greeting_conversation
schema.description: A short conversation node with an initial greeting and ordered reply options.

root_fields.title: Hello — quick reply options
root_fields.summary: Record of a received greeting and three concise reply options in different tones for immediate use.

fields.context_note: Casual, immediate reply choices for a friendly chat.

usage_notes: Invites a short update or small talk

fields.text: Hello — nice to hear from you.
usage_notes: Suitable for formal or semi-formal contacts

user_facing.title: Quick replies to 'hello'
user_facing.overview: Three concise reply options in different tones so you can respond immediately based on context.

sections.title: Friendly option
sections.summary: A warm, open reply that invites conversation.
bullets: Use with peers or casual acquaintances

sections.title: Polite option
sections.summary: A slightly more formal and courteous response.
bullets: Text: "Hello — nice to hear from you."
Good for workplace or semi-formal contacts

sections.title: Casual option
sections.summary: A relaxed, informal reply for close friends.
bullets: Use with close friends or informal groups

user_facing.title: Quick replies to 'hello'

sections.title: Friendly option
sections.summary: A warm, open reply that invites conversation.
bullets: Use with peers or casual acquaintances

sections.title: Polite option
sections.summary: A slightly more formal and courteous response.
bullets: Text: "Hello  nice to hear from you."

domain.name: communication
domain.description: Short written communication and conversational planning (greetings, replies, tone selection).

task.name: simple_greeting_response
task.title: Simple Greeting and Reply Options
task.description: Provide a brief greeting record and several short reply options with tones and usage notes.

task_schema.name: greeting_conversation
task_schema.description: A short conversation node with an initial greeting and ordered reply options.
task_schema.hierarchy:
GreetingConversation (root)
    |-- Greeting (leaf)
    `-- ResponseOptions (container, indexed by @index)
        `-- Option (leaf)
task_schema.syntax_rules:
- Paths start with /GreetingConversation
- Node types: GreetingConversation, Greeting, ResponseOptions, Option
- Indices: Node[1], Node[-1], Node[1:3]
- Logical: AND / OR / not() combine predicates WITHIN brackets

domain_schema.name: root_task_version
domain_schema.description: Global container for tasks with versions
domain_schema.hierarchy:
Root (root)
  `-- Task (container, indexed by @name)
      `-- Version (version, indexed by @number)

memory_xml:
<?xml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'?>
<Root><GreetingConversation_Version number="1"><patch_info>cold start initialization</patch_info><conversation_history>hello</conversation_history><GreetingConversation><title>Hello  quick reply options</title><summary>Record of a received greeting and three concise reply options in different tones for immediate use.</summary><Greeting><text>hello</text><language>English</language></Greeting><ResponseOptions index="1"><context_note>Casual, immediate reply choices for a friendly chat.</context_note><Option><text>Hi! How's it going?</text><tone>friendly</tone><usage_notes><usage_note>Good for peers or acquaintances</usage_note><usage_note>Invites a short update or small talk</usage_note></usage_notes></Option><Option><text>Hello  nice to hear from you.</text><tone>polite</tone><usage_notes><usage_note>Suitable for formal or semi-formal contacts</usage_note><usage_note>Keeps tone warm but reserved</usage_note></usage_notes></Option><Option><text>Hey! What's up?</text><tone>casual</tone><usage_notes><usage_note>Use with close friends</usage_note><usage_note>Encourages quick, informal replies</usage_note></usage_notes></Option></ResponseOptions></GreetingConversation></GreetingConversation_Version></Root>

display.domain_schema:
name: root_task_version
description: Global container for tasks with versions
hierarchy: "Root (root)\n  `-- Task (container, indexed by @name)\n      `-- Version\
  \ (version, indexed by @number)"
nodes:
  Root:
    type: root
    fields: []
    children:
    - Task
  Task:
    type: container
    index_attr: name
    fields:
    - title
    - description
    - status
    children:
    - Version
  Version:
    type: version
    index_attr: number
    fields:
    - patch_info
    - conversation_history
    - created_at
    - schema_name
    - data_name
    - summary
    children: []
display.task_schema:
name: greeting_conversation
description: A short conversation node with an initial greeting and ordered reply
  options.
hierarchy: "GreetingConversation (root)\n    |-- Greeting (leaf)\n    `-- ResponseOptions\
  \ (container, indexed by @index)\n        `-- Option (leaf)"
nodes:
  GreetingConversation:
    type: root
    fields:
    - title
    - summary
    children:
    - Greeting
    - ResponseOptions
  Greeting:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - text
    - language
    children: []
  ResponseOptions:
    type: container
    fields:
    - context_note
    children:
    - Option
    index_attr: index
  Option:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - text
    - tone
    - usage_notes
    children: []
data_files:
  simple_greeting_response: memory/communication/simple_greeting_response.xml
default_data: simple_greeting_response
examples_file: prompts/query_generator/domains/xpath_examples_greeting_conversation.txt
syntax_rules: '- Paths start with /GreetingConversation

  - Node types: GreetingConversation, Greeting, ResponseOptions, Option

  - Indices: Node[1], Node[-1], Node[1:3]

  - Logical: AND / OR / not() combine predicates WITHIN brackets'
display.memory_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" ?>
<Root>
  <GreetingConversation_Version number="1">
    <patch_info>cold start initialization</patch_info>
    <conversation_history>hello</conversation_history>
    <GreetingConversation>
      <title>Hello  quick reply options</title>
      <summary>Record of a received greeting and three concise reply options in different tones for immediate use.</summary>
      <Greeting>
        <text>hello</text>
        <language>English</language>
      </Greeting>
      <ResponseOptions index="1">
        <context_note>Casual, immediate reply choices for a friendly chat.</context_note>
        <Option>
          <text>Hi! How's it going?</text>
          <tone>friendly</tone>
          <usage_notes>
            <usage_note>Good for peers or acquaintances</usage_note>
            <usage_note>Invites a short update or small talk</usage_note>
          </usage_notes>
        </Option>
        <Option>
          <text>Hello  nice to hear from you.</text>
          <tone>polite</tone>
          <usage_notes>
            <usage_note>Suitable for formal or semi-formal contacts</usage_note>
            <usage_note>Keeps tone warm but reserved</usage_note>
          </usage_notes>
        </Option>
        <Option>
          <text>Hey! What's up?</text>
          <tone>casual</tone>
          <usage_notes>
            <usage_note>Use with close friends</usage_note>
            <usage_note>Encourages quick, informal replies</usage_note>
          </usage_notes>
        </Option>
      </ResponseOptions>
    </GreetingConversation>
  </GreetingConversation_Version>
</Root>
